evidence: standards/enterprise/mobile-security.md and the final joined AI consistency review
exception_policy: A delayed threat-model update requires Security Owner approval, an interim risk assessment, an owner, an expiry, and a removal plan.
statement: Every security-relevant feature and material boundary change maintains an owned threat model identifying protected assets, DATA-CLASS-001 classes, entry points, trust boundaries, abuse cases, mitigations, residual risk, and review event.
